description_long: This is a humanoid figure with pointed ears, suggesting an elf-like character, dressed in layered medieval or fantasy-inspired attire. The figure wears a short-sleeved tunic over a fitted shirt, with a belted skirt that has jagged edges and a layered look. Long gloves cover the arms up to the elbows, and knee-high boots complete the outfit. The character's hair is long and straight, draping over one shoulder and down the back, partially obscuring the face from the front. The overall build is slender and athletic, with a neutral, upright stance and arms extended outward. The clothing and accessories are simple, with no visible carried objects or ornate details.
description: A slender, elf-like adult in fantasy-style layered clothing, long gloves, and boots, with long straight hair draped over one shoulder. The figure stands upright with arms outstretched and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed ears, long hair covering part of the face, layered tunic, gloves, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the pointed ear, the drape of the hair, and the layered skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full length of the straight hair, the back of the tunic, and the gloves extending to the elbows.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear, hair, and the side profile of the layered clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy-style tunic with layered skirt, long gloves, and knee-high boots
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair draped over one shoulder
